ethp2p                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                         next-generation p2p networking for Ethereum

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                             raul

                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                          ██ ethp2p                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                               a fresh start for p2p networking                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                       state-of-the-art                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                  purpose-built for Ethereum

                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       2 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Agenda                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  ethp2p                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                        •  erasure-coded broadcast                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                        •  simulations                                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                        •  netviz                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                        •  xray

                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       3 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ ethp2p is now open source                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     From now on, we're building in the open.                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     https://github.com/ethp2p/ethp2p                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       4 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Design principles                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ Vertical integration                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  ethp2p is not a generic networking stack, it is specialized for Ethereum                                                                                                                                                           
                        •  It knows about deadlines, priorities, slot phases, and object specificities, and fine-tunes everything accordingly                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ Mechanical sympathy                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Every layer works in synergy with the next; no unnecessary abstractions that leak performance or obstruct features                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ Zero idle resources                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Maximize productivity by putting all fiber allocated to the node at the service of Ethereum                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ Privacy by default                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  No matter how CROPS the upper layers are, if the network is leaky and insecure, Ethereum will remain vulnerable                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ Consistent performance is correctness                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  In a time-critical protocol like Ethereum, getting bytes to the right place in time is part of correctness                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       5 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Five layers                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Layer     │ Status         │ Key notions                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                     ──────────┼────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                   
                     Transport │ 🌗 Designing   │ QUIC, TLS 1.3+ECH, BBRv3, TCP/QMux                                                                                                                                                                           
                     Peering   │ 🌗 Designing   │ Duty-aware, composite scoring, supernodes                                                                                                                                                                    
                     Broadcast │ 🌕 Implemented │ Erasure coding, per-object protocols                                                                                                                                                                         
                     Privacy   │ 🌑 Research    │ 2-hop mixnet, RLN, decoy traffic                                                                                                                                                                             
                     Control   │ 🌗 Designing   │ Slot-phase shaping, duty scheduling                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       6 / 29
