                     ██ Five layers                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                          ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                           CONSENSUS CLIENT                            │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                (beacon chain, fork choice, validator)                 │                                                                                           
                                                                                          └───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘                                                                                           
                                                                                                                              │                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                              ▼                                                                                                                               
                                                                                          ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                             CONTROL PLANE                             │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  Duty Scheduler · Traffic Shaper · EL/CL Conductor · Observability    │                                                                                           
                                                                                          └───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘                                                                                           
                                                                                                                              │                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                              ▼                                                                                                                               
                                                                                          ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                            BROADCAST LAYER                            │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  Block · Attestation · Aggregate · Blob/DAS · PTC/IL · BAL            │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  Erasure coding engine (Reed-Solomon, rateless codes)                 │                                                                                           
                                                                                          └───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘                                                                                           
                                                                                                                              │                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                              ▼                                                                                                                               
                                                                                          ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                             PRIVACY LAYER                             │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  2-Hop Mixnet · Rate Limiting Nullifiers · OHTTP · Privacy Pass       │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  ZK Proofs · Decoy Generator                                          │                                                                                           
                                                                                          └───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘                                                                                           
                                                                                                                              │                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                              ▼                                                                                                                               
                                                                                          ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                             PEERING LAYER                             │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  Network View · Peer Quality · Strategic Peering · Supernodes         │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  Connection Pool · QUIC Session Resumption · Discovery V5             │                                                                                           
                                                                                          └───────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────┘                                                                                           
                                                                                                                              │                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                              ▼                                                                                                                               
                                                                                          ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                           
                                                                                          │                            TRANSPORT LAYER                            │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  Stream Manager · QUIC (primary) · TCP/QMux (fallback)                │                                                                                           
                                                                                          │  TLS 1.3 + ECH · BBRv3/Prague CC · Multipath · Flow Control           │                                                                                           
                                                                                          └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       7 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Transport: QUIC-native                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▍ We do not abstract over transports. The transport layer                                                                                                                                                                                
                     ▍ knows about deadlines, priorities, and slot phases because                                                                                                                                                                             
                     ▍ the transport layer is QUIC.                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Native multiplexing, no head-of-line blocking, 0-RTT (RFC 9000)                                                                                                                                                                    
                        •  Unreliable datagrams for fire-and-forget, e.g. attestations (RFC 9221)                                                                                                                                                             
                        •  TLS 1.3 + Encrypted Client Hello: content AND metadata privacy                                                                                                                                                                     
                        •  BBRv3 congestion control; Prague CC / L4S for ECN paths                                                                                                                                                                            
                        •  Stream priorities favor critical-path traffic during congestion                                                                                                                                                                    
                        •  Multipath QUIC aggregates bandwidth across interfaces (RFC 9443)                                                                                                                                                                   
                        •  MASQUE: QUIC-native proxy, privacy building block + relay transport                                                                                                                                                                
                        •  TCP/QMux fallback when QUIC is blocked                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ Censorship resistance                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     QUIC + TLS 1.3 + ECH = indistinguishable from ordinary HTTPS. Same ports, same handshake, same packet structure.                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     The more our traffic looks like normal internet traffic, the harder it is to censor.                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       8 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▓▓▓ QUIC capabilities                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Load-bearing QUIC capabilities:                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Stream priorities: block propagation over background sync                                                                                                                                                                          
                        •  Pacing + flow control: load balance when writes would block                                                                                                                                                                        
                        •  Pluggable CC: BBRv3, Prague CC match algorithm to path                                                                                                                                                                             
                        •  Multipath: bandwidth aggregation between emergent supernodes                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       9 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Peering: the validator schedule is deterministic                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Hold a full network view via discv5.                                                                                                                                                                                               
                        •  10k ENR records cost 7-9 MiB.                                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Peer tables structured in selfish and altruistic segments:                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                       ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │                 Peer Table                   │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       ├──────────────────────┬───────────────────────┤                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │  SELFISH             │  ALTRUISTIC           │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │                      │                       │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │  att subnet  [    ]  │  chain sync   [    ]  │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │  committee   [    ]  │  bootstrap    [    ]  │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │  DAS column  [    ]  │  light client [    ]  │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       │  aggregator  [    ]  │                       │                                                                                                       
                                                                                                       └──────────────────────┴───────────────────────┘                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Connections warmed during slot downtime, resumed via 0-RTT when duties arrive.                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▍ We can send data to any peer in the network, at any time.                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      10 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ QoS and RTT awareness => emergent supernodes                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Leverage endpoint/link metadata to establish topologies.                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  RTT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                        •  geoip                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  AS                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Supernodes emerge based on local empirical observations of QoS provided by nodes (e.g. feedback loops), not organized top-down.                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Graceful degradation is a MUST. If the supernode highway is disrupted, the protocol must continue operating.                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      11 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Privacy: attestations deanonymize validators
