                     Recurring, deterministic, correlatable.                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     A passive observer monitoring outbound timing over a few epochs links IPs to validator identities. Once linked: censorship, DoS, coercion.                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Potential building blocks:                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  OHTTP 2-hop mixnet built on MASQUE (QUIC-native relaying)                                                                                                                                                                          
                        •  VRF-selected relays: rotating per epoch, validator-proven                                                                                                                                                                          
                        •  Rate Limiting Nullifiers: rate limiting without revealing identity                                                                                                                                                                 
                        •  Privacy Pass: lightweight anonymous tokens for rate compliance                                                                                                                                                                     
                        •  Decoy traffic: 10% of real, indistinguishable in format/timing                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ▍ Privacy yields to liveness, but the default is maximum                                                                                                                                                                                 
                     ▍ privacy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      12 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Control: EL and CL share the pipe                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Today they do not coordinate. The EL gossips transactions while the CL is pushing on the critical path. Neither knows what the other is doing, other than the coarse-grained Engine API.                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     The deliberate control plane orchestrates bandwidth utilization and prioritization based on our status within the slot:                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Phase         │ Window │ Priority                                                                                                                                                                                                        
                     ──────────────┼────────┼─────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                                            
                     Block arrival │ 0-2s   │ CL maximum bandwidth                                                                                                                                                                                            
                     Attestation   │ 2-4s   │ Subnet traffic                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                     Aggregation   │ 4-8s   │ Aggregate push                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                     Idle / prep   │ 8-12s  │ Released to EL                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Duty scheduler precomputes peer sets an epoch ahead. Circuit breakers isolate misbehaving peers.                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      13 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                         ██ Broadcast                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                             erasure-coded parallel dissemination                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      14 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Where gossipsub is underserving us                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Store-and-forward: receive full payload, validate, forward                                                                                                                                                                         
                        •  Works reasonably well for small messages, but breaks down for large messages.                                                                                                                                                      
                        •  Latency proportional to hops x message size                                                                                                                                                                                        
                        •  Amplification wastes bandwidth on redundant full copies                                                                                                                                                                            
                        •  IHAVE/IWANT chatter for content-addressed messages                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        •  Mono-stream: head of line blocking on a stream affects all topics.                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     But Ethereum's workload is not unknown.                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Bursty, time-sensitive, size-bounded, predictable. We know what attestations to expect per committee. Topic names represent 27% of attestation data on the wire.                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      15 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Erasure-coded broadcast                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Split a message into chunks. Add redundancy through coding. Spread in parallel. Any node collecting enough valid chunks reconstructs the original.                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Key shift: a relay with partial data is already contributing.                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                   store-and-forward:                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                     O ──[full msg]──▸ A ──[full msg]──▸ B ──[full msg]──▸ N                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                   erasure-coded:                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                     O ──[chunks]──▸ A ──[relay]──╮                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                     O ──[chunks]──▸ B ──[relay]──┤──▸ N ✓ reconstructed                                                                                                      
                                                                                                     O ──[chunks]─────────────────╯                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Parallel paths carry useful chunks concurrently.                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      16 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Channels, sessions, chunks                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Three concepts organize broadcast on the wire.                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Channels are named broadcast topics.
