A node subscribes to the channels it cares about: blocks, attestations, blobs.                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Sessions demarcate the propagation of a single message. When a block is published, the origin opens a session carrying the coding parameters and initial routing state. When the session ends, all resources are                         
                     released.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Chunks are the unit of transfer. Each chunk gets its own QUIC stream: opened, sent, closed. One message may produce hundreds of chunks flowing concurrently across different peers.                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     These map to three subprotocols:                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                  BCAST (long-lived):    A ◄══════════════════════► B                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                           handshake, subscribe                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                  SESS  (per-session):   A ──Open+Preamble────────► B                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                         A ──RoutingUpdate─────────► B                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                  CHUNK (ephemeral):     A ──[hdr|data]──► B                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                         B resets SESS ──x A  (reconstructed)                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Ephemeral streams are cheap in QUIC. The pattern mimics HTTP/3.                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      17 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Session lifecycle                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                        TakeChunk               Decode                                                                                                                        
                                                                                             ┌────────────┐ complete=true ┌──────────┐ succeeds ┌───────────────┐                                                                                             
                                                                                             │ Consuming  │─────────────▸│ Decoding │────────▸│ Reconstructed │                                                                                               
                                                                                             └────────────┘               └──────────┘          └───────────────┘                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                             ┌──────────────────┐                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                             │ Origin (publish) │  never transitions                                                                                                                          
                                                                                             └──────────────────┘                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Consuming: accept verified chunks, relay chunks immediately                                                                                                                                                                        
                        •  Decoding: background task; no more chunks accepted                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        •  Reconstructed: message delivered; continue serving peers                                                                                                                                                                           
                        •  Origin: publisher serves from production queue                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Stages are monotonic. Completion signaled before decode finishes.                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Sessions are how ethp2p demarcates propagation. Each message gets its own session with its own coding parameters and routing state. Session disposal releases all resources; no state leaks across messages or                           
                     slots.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      18 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Framework / Strategy                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Framework owns: connections, streams, session lifecycle, wire protocol, event-driven dispatch                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                               type Strategy[CI, R] interface {                                                               
                     Strategy owns: encoding, decoding, verification, routing policy, dispatch decisions                                                         VerifyChunk(                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                   peer PeerID,                                                                               
                     Adding a coding scheme = implement Strategy. No wire protocol changes.                                                                        id CI,                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                   data []byte,                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                 ) Verdict                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                 TakeChunk(                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                   peer PeerID,                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                   id CI,                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                   data []byte, ...                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                 ) (Verdict, bool, error)                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                 PollChunks() []ChunkDispatch[CI]                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                 PollRouting(bool) (R, bool)                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                 Decode() ([]byte, error)                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                               }                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Pull-based: framework polls after every state-mutating event. Strategies return work, never push.                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      19 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Reed-Solomon: per-chunk authentication                                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Systematic code: k data shards + (n-k) parity shards. Any k of n suffice to reconstruct.                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Each shard independently verifiable (SHA-256 hash)                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        •  Invalid chunks rejected before entering strategy state                                                                                                                                                                             
                        •  Relay verifies and forwards each shard on arrival                                                                                                                                                                                  
                        •  Already deployed in Ethereum for PeerDAS blob erasure coding                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Primary candidate for production. Public domain. Per-chunk Merkle, or builder authentication.                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Limitation: relays cannot recode. They forward exact shards. Creates a coupon collector dynamic: the last few shards dominate completion time.                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      20 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Fighting the coupon collector                                                                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Peers exchange routing updates: bitmaps advertising which shards they already hold.                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     The sender skips redundant shards and prioritizes rare ones. This is how the emit planner knows what to send next:                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                          ┌─────────────────────────────┐                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                          │  Emit planner (min-heap)    │                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                          │  ordered by allocation cnt  │                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                          └──────────┬──────────────────┘                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                     ▼                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                            ┌──────────────┐ yes                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                            │ Peer has it? ├──────▸ skip                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                            └──────┬───────┘                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                   │ no                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                            ┌──────────────┐ yes                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                            │  In-flight?  ├──────▸ skip                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                            └──────┬───────┘                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                   │ no                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                            ┌──────────────┐ exhausted                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                            │   Budget?    ├──────▸ skip                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                            └──────┬───────┘                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                   │ available                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                            ┌──────────────┐                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                            │   Dispatch   │──▸ mark optimistic                                                                                                               
                                                                                                            └──────────────┘                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Bitmap routing: peers advertise inventory                                                                                                                                                                                          
                        •  Least-allocated-first: rare shards dispatched first                                                                                                                                                                                
                        •  Fibonacci hashing: neighboring relays spread different shards                                                                                                                                                                      
                        •  ForwardMultiplier (default 4): caps per-relay amplification                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Within ~10% of RLNC's p90 across benchmarked message sizes.                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      21 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ RLNC: every outbound chunk is innovative                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Patent-encumbered. Benchmarked for comparison only.                                                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Relays recode: fresh random linear combinations from their basis over Ristretto255.                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Every outbound chunk adds information with high probability, regardless of what the peer holds.
