No coupon collector.                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     The costs:                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Coefficient vector overhead per chunk (~3% for Ristretto255)                                                                                                                                                                       
                        •  No per-chunk verification without homomorphic commitments                                                                                                                                                                          
                        •  A malicious chunk corrupts the generation; detectable at decode                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Dispatch constraints:                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Forward budget per accepted inbound chunk (default 4x)                                                                                                                                                                             
                        •  Interaction bound: don't recycle chunks back to contributor                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      22 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Third option: fountain codes (R10)                                                                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Where RS fixes the coding rate at the origin, a rateless encoder produces chunks indefinitely. The network decides when "enough" have arrived.                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     The feedback signal is attestation rate: if attestations arrive quickly after a block, propagation succeeded and the encoder stops. If attestations lag, the encoder increases output.                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Attestations become an implicit ACK channel for broadcast quality. R10 is public domain; natural complement to RS.                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      23 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Small per-object broadcast                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Ethereum objects are bursty, time-sensitive, predictable. Each type gets its own propagation strategy. For example:                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Attestations:                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  QUIC datagrams, MTU-aware batching                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                        •  Ordinal subnet IDs (27% smaller than topic name strings)                                                                                                                                                                           
                        •  Bitmap committee havelists replace content-addressed message IDs                                                                                                                                                                   
                        •  Source batching: multiple validators in the same committee send a single batch.                                                                                                                                                    
                        •  Suppress deanonymization behavioral vectors.                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Target: 400ms p80.                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      24 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                        ██ Simulations                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      25 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ Simulation framework                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                        # install the CLI                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                        cd sim/cli && uv sync                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                        # run a single simulation                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                        simctl run simulation.yaml                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                        # compare strategies side by side                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                        simctl experiment run experiment.yaml                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Two drivers:                                                                                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                        •  Shadow: discrete-event simulator, separate processes per node, simulated network I/O. Scales to 1000+ nodes.                                                                                                                       
                        •  Simnet: in-process, Go testing/synctest. Deterministic, fast iteration. Up to ~16 nodes.                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     Topologies from real data: Ethereum geographic distribution, country-to-country RTT matrix, EIP-7870 bandwidth defaults.
