                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      26 / 29 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                     ██ A simulation                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                  name: bench-500                                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                  description: "500-node, 2 MiB benchmark comparing gossipsub, RS-ChunkLen, RLNC-ChunkLen"                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                  simulation:                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                    driver: shadow                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                    log_level: info                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                    trace_file: trace.bctrace                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                  topology:                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                    generate:                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                      num_nodes: 500                                                                                                                                                          
                                                                                      degree: 10                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                      type: realistic                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                      seed: 1828923                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                      super_node_fraction: 0.05                                                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                  workload:                                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                    num_messages: 2                                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                    message_size: 2097152                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                    publish_wait_seconds: 10.0                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                    stop_time_minutes: 10.0                                                                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                  strategies:                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                    - name: gossipsub                                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                    - name: RS-ChunkLen                                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                      chunk_len: 16384                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                      enable_bitmaps: true                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                      bitmap_threshold: 0                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                    - name: RLNC-ChunkLen                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                      target_chunk_size: 16384                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                      num_chunks_per_generation: 16                                                                                                                                           
                                                                                      origin_redundancy: 4                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                      enable_bitmaps: true
